examples: As hare numbers fall, so do lynx numbers, as their food supply depleted.
The Canada lynx shows a ten-year cycle of abundance that parallels the abundance cycle of hares.
Also, text browsers such as Lynx don't present images well.
If you want to catch a lynx, a bear or even a wolf, Rolland is your man.
In the championship series, the Lynx faced a very tough Atlanta Dream, but they were ready.
